croire.intro: Gold Coast Croire is Pronaj's agribusiness venture — one brand carrying Ghana's fertile coast to world markets. Premium growing substrate, greenhouse produce and value-added processing, built on the trade infrastructure Pronaj already operates.
croire.whyBody: Croire is French for believe. The Gold Coast fed empires long before it exported gold — we believe its soil is still the region's most undervalued asset. Croire is our commitment to prove it: patient capital, precision agriculture, and a brand worthy of the coast it grows on.

substrate.title: Cocopeat Substrate
substrate.desc: Premium washed and buffered cocopeat, processed from Ghanaian coconut husk and compressed for export.

greenhouse.title: Greenhouse Produce
greenhouse.desc: Precision-grown vegetables under climate control — consistent quality, year-round supply.

processing.title: Value-Added Processing
processing.desc: Moving up the chain: drying, grading and packaging at origin so more value stays in Ghana.

logistics.title: Export & Trade Logistics
logistics.desc: Consolidated cold-chain and dry-cargo routes from Tema to Europe and the Middle East.

phase1.title: Explore
phase1.desc: Validate crops, partners and demand across target markets. Secure certifications and land partnerships.

phase2.title: Pilot
phase2.desc: First branded shipments under Gold Coast Croire. Greenhouse expansion and initial processing lines.

phase3.title: Scale
phase3.desc: Full processing capacity, a regional sourcing network, and Croire on shelves across three continents.

croire.disclaimer: Targets reflect Pronaj's development plan for the Croire brand, not current production.
croire.ctaBody: We are in conversation with distributors, growers and investors across Europe and the Middle East. If the Gold Coast belongs in your supply chain, let's talk.

sectors.digitalDesc: Web development, cybersecurity, and software engineering solutions for the modern enterprise.
sectors.livingDesc: IKEA-inspired furniture and prefabricated container housing for sustainable, modern living.
sectors.globalDesc: Cocopeat export and precision greenhouse farming under our Gold Coast Croire brand, from Ghana to global markets.

trust.delawareDesc: Registered in Ghana, running production, agriculture and regional operations.
trust.accraDesc: Serving clients across Africa, Europe and the Middle East, adding international structure as each market requires.
trust.bridgeTitle: Rooted in Ghana, built to scale
trust.bridgeSubtitle: An Accra-based company operating across Ghana — structured to expand internationally as export volumes and investor needs grow.

narrative.body: Pronaj operates at the intersection of three critical industries. We believe that technological innovation, sustainable living solutions, and responsible global trade are not separate endeavors—they are interconnected pillars of a better future.
narrative.techDesc: Cutting-edge digital solutions powering businesses across industries.
narrative.sustainDesc: Eco-conscious design in housing, furniture, and agricultural practices.
narrative.tradeDesc: Connecting African resources to international markets through compliant channels.

about.intro: Pronaj is a multi-industry business bridging technology, sustainable living, and global trade. Based in Accra, Ghana, we're building solutions that matter — starting local and scaling to international markets.
about.precisionDesc: Every project, every product, every partnership is executed with meticulous attention to detail.
about.reachDesc: We bridge continents, connecting African excellence to international markets.
about.peopleDesc: Our success is built on empowering our team and the communities we serve.
about.t2020: Pronaj Ghana Ltd founded in Accra
about.t2023: Expanded regional operations and export partnerships
about.ctaBody: We're always looking for talented individuals to join our team across all divisions.

digital.intro: Enterprise-grade web development, cybersecurity, and software engineering services. We build robust digital infrastructure for businesses ready to scale.
digital.servicesBody: From concept to deployment, we deliver end-to-end digital solutions with precision engineering and industry best practices.
digital.ctaBody: Let's discuss your project requirements and create a tailored solution for your business.

living.intro: From flat-pack furniture to prefabricated container homes, we design and manufacture sustainable living solutions that combine efficiency with elegance.
living.furnitureDesc: IKEA-inspired flat-pack furniture designed for modern living
living.containerDesc: Prefabricated container homes for sustainable, efficient living
living.philosophyBody: Every piece we create starts with a problem to solve. We believe that great design should be accessible, sustainable, and built to last. Our modular approach means less waste, easier transport, and products that adapt to your life.
living.ctaBody: Whether you need a single piece of furniture or a complete container home, we're here to help.

global.intro: Connecting African agricultural excellence to global markets under our Gold Coast Croire brand. Cocopeat, precision greenhouse farming, and sustainable trade — grown in Ghana.
global.croireBody: One brand carrying Ghana's fertile coast to world markets — substrate, greenhouse produce and value-added processing under a single name.
global.cocopeatDesc: Premium cocopeat substrate exported from Ghana to global markets
global.greenhouseDesc: Precision agriculture producing year-round fresh produce
global.structureBody: Pronaj is registered and operated in Ghana, handling production, sourcing and regional distribution. As export volumes and investor requirements grow, we establish the international structure each market demands — scaling deliberately from a strong local base.
global.llcDesc: We incorporate abroad — for example a US entity — only when export contracts or investors require it, never before it's warranted.
global.ghanaDesc: Operations subsidiary managing production, local sourcing, and regional distribution.
global.ctaBody: Whether you're a distributor, retailer, or agricultural business, we're ready to discuss partnership opportunities.

cocopeat.intro: High-quality cocopeat substrate processed from coconut husks in Ghana and exported worldwide under our Gold Coast Croire agribusiness brand. Perfect for horticulture, agriculture, and landscaping.
cocopeat.hortDesc: Ideal growing medium for nurseries and greenhouses
cocopeat.agriDesc: Soil amendment for improved water retention
cocopeat.ctaBody: Contact us for bulk pricing, sample requests, or to discuss your specific requirements.

greenhouse.intro: State-of-the-art greenhouse facilities in Ghana producing year-round fresh produce using precision agriculture technology. IoT monitoring, automated climate control, and sustainable practices.
greenhouse.sustainBody: Our greenhouse operations are designed with sustainability at their core. From water recycling to solar power, we're minimizing our footprint while maximizing yield.
greenhouse.ctaBody: We supply fresh produce to retailers, restaurants, and distributors. Contact us to discuss supply agreements.

careers.intro: Join a team that's building the infrastructure of tomorrow. We're looking for talented individuals across technology, manufacturing, and agriculture.
careers.j1d: Build scalable web applications for enterprise clients.
careers.j2d: Conduct security assessments and incident response.
careers.j4d: Manage cocopeat export logistics and compliance.
careers.j5d: Operate and maintain precision agriculture systems.
careers.ctaBody: We're always looking for talented people. Send us your resume and we'll keep you in mind for future opportunities.
